case_title: METRO CAB LLC VS. MAGDY KAMEL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT KAMEL, MAGDY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-13-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR SMALL CLAIMS HEARING HEARING SET FOR MAR-13-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-13-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-13-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: PHILLIP HWEE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS AS TO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF METRO CAB LLC
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $500.00 FILED BY KAMEL, MAGDY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT METRO CAB LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF METRO CAB LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR, CASE CONTINUED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KAMEL, MAGDY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT METRO CAB LLC (NEITHER PLAINTIFF NOR DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT RECOVER ANY THING FROM EACH OTHER) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF METRO CAB LLC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KAMEL, MAGDY PLAINTIFF, ON HIS OWN, RETAINED AN ATTORNEY TO CHALLENGE THE TRAFFIC TICKET. THE SAN MATEO COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT DISMISSED THE TRAFFIC CASE IN THE INTERESTS OF JUSTICE. PLAINTIFF HAS NO BASIS TO RECOVER ATTORNEY'S FEES IN SUCCESSFULLY DEFENDING THE TICKET CITATION.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
